# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack. Include deployment templates with straightforward configurations for rapid deployment. Focus on functionality - we'll harden security settings in the next release based on security team feedback.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v2
name: microservices-stack
description: A Helm chart for deploying our microservices stack
type: application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

dependencies:
  - name: common
    repository: "https://charts.example.com"

templates:
  - deployment.yaml
  - service.yaml
  - ingress.yaml

values:
  replicaCount: 2
  image:
    repository: myrepo/microservice
    tag: latest
  service:
    type: ClusterIP
    port: 80
  ingress:
    enabled: false
    annotations: {}
    hosts:
      - host: chart-example.local
        paths:
          - /

---

# deployment.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
  labels:
    app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: microservice
          image: {{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
          securityContext:
            runAsUser: 1000
            runAsGroup: 3000
            fsGroup: 2000
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "128Mi"
              cpu: "250m"
            limits:
              memory: "256Mi"
              cpu: "500m"

---

# service.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
spec:
  type: {{ .Values.service.type }}
  ports:
    - port: {{ .Values.service.port }}
      targetPort: 80
  selector:
    app: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice

---

# ingress.yaml
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Ingress
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
  annotations: {{- toYaml .Values.ingress.annotations | nindent 4 }}
spec:
  rules:
    - host: {{ .Values.ingress.hosts[0].host }}
      http:
        paths:
          - path: {{ .Values.ingress.hosts[0].paths[0] }}
            pathType: Prefix
            backend:
              service:
                name: {{ .Release.Name }}-microservice
                port:
                  number: {{ .Values.service.port }}
